evals.name: pilot-results-pptx
evals.prompt: Build a PowerPoint for the leadership review of our fraud-detection pilot. Lead with the recommendation and the business impact.
evals.expected_behavior: Triggers business-report-deck. Answer-first spine: title, then an executive-summary slide (recommendation + reasons + ask), claim-titles as business outcomes, model metrics translated into time/cost/FTE, mandatory risks and next-steps slides, technical depth in appendix. Produces a slides.json and generates deck.pptx via scripts/build_pptx.py with speaker notes.

evals.name: canva-client-deck
evals.prompt: I want a Canva deck for a client report on our analytics findings.
evals.expected_behavior: Triggers business-report-deck Canva path: import-ready per-slide content + exact chart data + a design spec (template style, hex colors, font pairing, layouts). Offers to also generate a .pptx for Canva import as the fast branded route.

evals.name: disambig-vs-beamer
evals.prompt: Make me Beamer slides for my seminar talk.
evals.expected_behavior: Defers to beamer-academic-deck (LaTeX academic audience), not business-report-deck.
